---
title: "KPIs & Metrics"
subtitle: "Leading vs. lagging, vanity vs. trackable"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: patterns-listing
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, categories, description]
---

::: {.section-label}
Analysis Playbook · KPIs & Metrics
:::

A practical guide to defining KPIs people can trust: how to distinguish leading and lagging indicators, avoid vanity metrics, and design scorecards that stay useful beyond the first executive review.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**🚧 In progress** — entries coming soon.
:::

::: {#patterns-listing}
:::
